channel.title: Visualization on Susan Chen
channel.description: Recent content in Visualization on Susan Chen

item.title: Project 3 : Visualizing Tech Salaries
item.description: In this project, I extracted tech salary data from levels.fyi.com and created multiple data visualizations to compare salaries, bonuses, benefits, etc. across the FAANG companies. Project Details: Data Source Repo Link

item.title: Project 2: Exo Google Trends
item.description: Google Trends allows user to search for at most 5 keywords at a time. This project demostrates how to search for more than 5 terms at once using the Google Trends API in python. Project Details: I also wrote a medium article for this project. Repo Link
